member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.IWFSServer
member.summary: Provides access to the available WFS Server properties and methods.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.IWFSServer.GetData(ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSHttpVerb,System.String)
member.summary: Handle a WFS request.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.IWFSServer.SetParameter(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Handle setting WFS Server parameter.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.WFSServer
member.summary: The WFS Server Object Extension.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError
member.summary: Disconnected editing error codes.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.S_DE_OK
member.summary: 0: Successful Disconnected Editing operation.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_OUT_NON_VERSIONED_DATA
member.summary: -2147219455: Cannot check out non versioned data.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_IN_INVALID_GEODATABASE
member.summary: -2147219454: Invalid CheckOut Geodatabase.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_GEODATABASE_HAS_CHECK_OUT
member.summary: -2147219453: Geodatabase has already a checkout data.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_INVALID_REPLICA_DESCRIPTION
member.summary: -2147219452: Replica description object is not properly initialized.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_OUT_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_RELEASE
member.summary: -2147219451: Creating check-outs is not supported on this geodatabase release.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_IN_NOT_SUPPORTED_IN_RELEASE
member.summary: -2147219450: Checking in data is not supported on this geodatabase release.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CAN_NOT_REUSE_SCHEMA_OF_VERSIONED_DATA
member.summary: -2147219449: Cannot reuse schema of versioned data during extracting or checking out data.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_OUT_INVALID_DATA
member.summary: -2147219448: Cannot checkout readonly or non versioned data.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CAN_NOT_REUSE_SCHEMA_WITH_OUTPUT_SPATIAL_REFERENCE
member.summary: -2147219447: Cannot reuse schema with an output spatial reference.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_OUT_UNREGISTER_FAILED
member.summary: -2147219446: Failed to unregisted check-out.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_CHECK_OUT_INVALID_SOURCE_WORKSPACE
member.summary: -2147219445: Cannot checkout personal or ArcSDE release prior to (1, 3, 0).

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_SYNCHRONIZE_INVALID_RELEASES
member.summary: -2147219444: Geodatabase releases of the master geodatabase and the checkout geodatabase should match.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_UPDATEGRAM_TOPOLOGY_DEFINITION_ACCESSING
member.summary: -2147219443: Error in accessing UpdateGram's Topology Definition element.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_TRANSFER_DELETE_TO_DATASET
member.summary: -2147219442: Error in transferring delete to dataset.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_TRANSFER_INSERT_TO_DATASET
member.summary: -2147219441: Error in transferring insert to dataset.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriDisconnectedEditingError.E_TRANSFER_UPDATE_TO_DATASET
member.summary: -2147219440: Error in transferring update to dataset.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSHttpVerb
member.summary: HTTP modes of WFSServer.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum
member.summary: WFSServer return message codes.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_SkippedDataset
member.summary: 92000: A dataset will not be exposed by the WFS.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToGenerateTransactionResponse
member.summary: 92001: Failed to generate the transaction response for a transaction that succeeded.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToDeleteLock
member.summary: 92002: Failed to delete lock after processing a transaction.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToDeleteOutstandingTransactionVersions
member.summary: 92003: Failed to delete temporary versions created to process a transaction.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_NotLicensed
member.summary: 92004: WFS server is not licensed.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_GetRequest
member.summary: 92005: The http GET request about to be processed.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_PostRequest
member.summary: 92006: The http POST request about to be processed.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_WFSExceptionReport
member.summary: 92007: The WFS exception report.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_Debug
member.summary: 92008: A generic code for WFS debug messages.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToReleaseLocks
member.summary: 92009: Feature locks failed to be released (they will eventually timeout).

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConstructStart
member.summary: 92010: The construction of the WFS started.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidAppSchemaNamespace
member.summary: 92011: Invalid application schema namespace in the WFS configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidAppSchemaPrefix
member.summary: 92012: Invalid application schema prefix in the WFS configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidDefaultLockExpiration
member.summary: 92013: Invalid default lock expiration value in the WFS configuratioln

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorPublishedWorkspaceIsntVersioned
member.summary: 92014: Transactions are enabled but the published workspace isn't versioned.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConstructEnded
member.summary: 92015: The construction of the WFS ended.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalid10AxisOrder
member.summary: 92016: Invalid AxisOrderWFS10 value in configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalid11AxisOrder
member.summary: 92017: Invalid AxisOrderWFS11 value in configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ErrorInvalidUseSRSNameFormat
member.summary: 92018: Invalid DetermineAxisOrderFromSRSNameFormat value in configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToReconcileAgainstSelf
member.summary: 92019: The server failed to process the transaction due to a failure reconciling the published version against itself.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToStopEditing
member.summary: 92020: The server failed to process the transaction due to a failure when it stopped editing.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ServerTooBusyToProcessTransaction
member.summary: 92021: The server failed to process the transaction because it is too busy processing other transactions.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToImportTransactionChanges
member.summary: 92022: The server failed to import the changes in the WFS transaction.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedCreatingTransactionResponse
member.summary: 92023: The server succeeded processing the transaction, but failed to generate the transaction response.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_TransactionFailedStoppingEditOperation
member.summary: 92024: The server failed to process the transaction because it was unable to stop the enclosing edit operation.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_FailedToStartEditing
member.summary: 92025: The server failed to process the transaction because it was unable to start editing or start an edit operation.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseDistributed.esriWFSServerMessageCodeEnum.esriWFSServerMessageCode_ConflictDetected
member.summary: 92026: The server failed to process the transaction because it unexpectedly found a conflict.
